hooks.command: python3 -c 'import sys,json,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get("file_path",""); re.search(r"(index|payment|order|stripe|razorpay)\.js$",f) and print("NOTICE: Payment-related file — verify computeQuote() is called server-side. Discount chain: Individual=0%, Group 2-4=15%, Group 5-9=25%, Group 10+=35%")'

python3 -c 'import sys,json,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get("file_path",""); re.search(r"routes/.*\.js$",f) and print("NOTICE: Route file — check: (1) Import paths end in .js (2) Admin routes use authenticateAdmin (3) User routes use authenticateJWT")'

python3 -c 'import sys,json,re,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get("file_path",""); re.search(r"src/.*\.js$",f) and "node_modules" not in f and subprocess.run(["node","--check",f]).returncode and print("SYNTAX ERROR in",f)'

python3 -c 'import sys,json,re,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get("file_path",""); re.search(r"src/.*\.js$",f) and subprocess.run(["grep","-q","require(",f]).returncode==0 and print("WARNING: require() found in",f,"— use import/export instead")'
echo 'Session complete. Reminders: (1) ES module imports need .js extension (2) Never trust client price values (3) Test coupon validation with curl after changes'
